title: File Upload
description: Upload source data files (CSV, TSV, delimited text) to begin the WhiteRabbit scanning pipeline. Files are stored securely and processed asynchronously — large uploads may take several minutes.
tips: Select the target OMOP CDM data source before uploading — this determines where scanned data will be loaded.
CSV/TSV files work best; avoid files with non-standard delimiters unless WhiteRabbit is configured for them.
Upload multiple files in one batch if they belong to the same source schema.
Files are automatically scanned by WhiteRabbit after upload — scanning may take 1–5 minutes per file.
Duplicate uploads for the same project are tracked — each upload creates a new job version.
